1.description: Get Finnmark county geometry to filter municipalities

2.description: Get all municipalities within Finnmark county

3.description: Get 200-year flood zones (flomareal) for spatial join

4.description: Get buildings within the municipalities of Finnmark

5.description: Join buildings to flood zones to count buildings in flood zones per municipality

6.description: Count buildings in flood zones per municipality

7.description: Sort municipalities by building count descending

args.sql:
SELECT
    fylke.fylkesnummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(fylke.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke
WHERE
    administrativenhetnavn.navn = 'Finnmark';

args.sql:
SELECT
    f.fylkesnummer,
    ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(f.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM
    fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.fylke f
JOIN
    fylker_a60155918c4a47c2b78f4ab52fc2bfa4.administrativenhetnavn a
    ON f.fylkesnummer = a.fylkesnummer
WHERE
    a.navn = 'Finnmark';
